pr.title: fix(ui-compiler): prevent [object HTMLElement] rendering in JSX expressions
pr.author: vertz-dev-core[bot]

testBeforeImpl.evidence: Commit messages show 'fix(ui): push disposal scope in onMount' followed by 'test(ui): add edge case tests for onMount disposal scope' - tests written AFTER implementation

redGreenCycle.evidence: Cannot verify from commit history alone; session transcript unavailable

oneTestAtATime.evidence: Tests appear to be added incrementally based on commit structure

qualityGatesBeforeCommit.evidence: Cannot verify without session transcript; no logs of 'bun run test && bun run typecheck && bun run lint' before commits

noTypeEscapes.evidence: No @ts-ignore, as any, .skip, or --no-verify found in diff

atomicCommits.evidence: Multiple logical commits shown in merge commit message

changesetAdded.evidence: git show cca3d38 --name-only shows no .changeset/*.md file; packages @vertz/ui and @vertz/ui-compiler modified without changeset

botScriptsUsed.evidence: Author is vertz-dev-core[bot], proper bot identity used

noPushToMain.evidence: PR merged via GitHub, not pushed directly to main

ciGreenBeforeMerge.evidence: gh pr checks 255 shows 'Lint, typecheck, test: fail' - PR merged with failing CI (Dagger infrastructure error)

readTicketFirst.evidence: No ticket linked in PR body; cannot verify ticket was read first

scopeCompliance.evidence: PR title says 'prevent [object HTMLElement] rendering' but also includes unrelated onMount/onCleanup disposal scope fix (lifecycle.ts + 77 lines of lifecycle.test.ts)

deviationsEscalated.evidence: Scope expanded to include unrelated fix without documenting as design deviation

developerWalkthrough.evidence: N/A - internal framework fix, no public API change requiring walkthrough

userOutcomeTests.evidence: Tests verify actual DOM behavior, not just internal API

verticalSlice.evidence: Complete feature: __child() and __insert() fully integrated into compiler and runtime

noEval.evidence: No eval() or new Function() in diff

inputSanitization.evidence: Proper type checking with 'instanceof Node' before DOM operations

violations.recommendation: Add changeset retroactively: 'bun changeset add' selecting both packages with patch bump

violations.evidence: gh pr checks 255 shows 'Lint, typecheck, test: fail' status
violations.recommendation: Re-run CI or investigate failure before merge, even for infrastructure issues

violations.description: Significant scope creep - bundled unrelated fixes
violations.evidence: PR includes both HTMLElement rendering fix AND onMount disposal scope fix (lifecycle.ts + 77 lines lifecycle.test.ts)
violations.recommendation: Split unrelated fixes into separate PRs, or document multi-fix PRs explicitly in description

violations.evidence: Commit sequence: 'fix(ui): push disposal scope' → 'test(ui): add edge case tests'
violations.recommendation: Write ONE failing test first, see it fail, then implement minimal code to pass

violations.description: Cannot verify quality gates run before commits
violations.evidence: No session transcript available; no logged evidence of 'bun run test && typecheck && lint' before commits
violations.recommendation: Bot sessions should log quality gate runs with timestamps for audit trail

violations.evidence: PR body does not reference a ticket number
violations.recommendation: Even for bug fixes, create ticket or reference issue that triggered the fix

summary: Technically sound fix with comprehensive test coverage and good code quality. However, multiple major process violations: missing changeset (critical), merged with failing CI, significant scope creep (bundled unrelated onMount fix), and likely TDD violations (tests after implementation). Grade: D - process compliance issues prevent higher grade despite quality code.
